XYZ company during the financial season combines two items A and B to form gift packs. Each pack must weigh 5 kg and should contain at least 2 kg of A and not more than 4 kg of B. The net contribution to the company is Rs. 10 per kg of A and Rs. 12 per kg of B. The company wants to determine the optimum mix. Formulate the above as a linear programming problem to maximize net contribution per pack and solve the same using the appropriate method.
